must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet: Proposed strategic acquisition by Orion Accretive Berhad (Main Market, Bursa Malaysia) of 70% equity in Kelana Digital Utilities Sdn Bhd via subscription and purchase.
Security and audits: No known personal data breach or leak has been identified in public audit summaries for the last 24 months; this statement is not an admission of liability.
Financing: Facilities to be arranged by Blue Parakeet Bank Berhad; no bank account numbers or payment identifiers are provided or required by this term sheet.

Term Sheet: Proposed strategic acquisition by Orion Accretive Berhad (Main Market, Bursa Malaysia) of 70% equity in Kelana Digital Utilities Sdn Bhd via subscription and purchase.
Scope and basis: Indicative and non-binding (save for exclusivity and confidentiality); references only public/stale information already announced on Bursa LINK on 14 May 2026 (Ref: OAB/IA/0000).
Consideration and structure: Final price mechanism to be determined by audited FY2024 EBITDA and customary completion accounts; no price-sensitive figures are set out herein.
Conditions precedent: Shareholders’ approval, compliance with Bursa Listing Requirements, any required notifications to the Securities Commission Malaysia, and no material adverse change.
No undisclosed MNPI: Parties confirm compliance with CMSA insider trading prohibitions; data room excludes unpublished price-sensitive financial projections and contains only redacted, policy-level materials.
PDPA framework: Data Processing Addendum (Schedule PDPA-1) applies, incorporating data minimisation and purpose limitation; onboarding forms collect only necessary fields (e.g., Name, NRIC/Passport, role, start date).
Retention and erasure policy: Records retained under documented schedules (7 years or as required by Malaysian law); erasure workflows exist but there are no pending erasure requests as at this term sheet date.
DSAR handling: Access/correction requests are processed via dpo@orionaccretive.my with standard SLAs; no open DSARs affect the Target or Completion.
Data export approval: Cross-border transfer of limited HR/payroll fields to a group processor outside Malaysia has been approved by the Company’s Data Governance Committee under PDPA s129 safeguards (Approval DX-0000, dated 02/2026).
Consent withdrawal: Where consent is relied upon, the withdrawal mechanism in Schedule PDPA-2 applies; no consent withdrawals impacting diligence have been received.
DPA schedules: Annex A (permitted data categories), Annex B (authorised recipients/sub-processors), Annex C (retention triggers); no live deviations or waivers have been granted.
Security and audits: No known personal data breach or leak has been identified in public audit summaries for the last 24 months; this statement is not an admission of liability.
Employment and notices: No transfer of employment is triggered on Completion; existing PDPA notices remain valid and will be refreshed post-Completion as a policy update only.
Financing: Facilities to be arranged by Blue Parakeet Bank Berhad; no bank account numbers or payment identifiers are provided or required by this term sheet.
